translations.Pair this Nextcloud with a Chamade gatew: Pair this Nextcloud with a Chamade gateway so AI agents can reach Talk rooms through a bot.
translations.Bot not registered — re-enable the app t: Bot not registered — re-enable the app to register.
translations.Not paired with a gateway yet: Not paired with a gateway yet
translations.Opens the Chamade gateway in this browse: Opens the Chamade gateway in this browser. You will be asked to sign in and confirm.
translations.Successfully paired with the Chamade gat: Successfully paired with the Chamade gateway.
translations.Try again — if the problem persists, con: Try again — if the problem persists, contact support.
translations.When enabled, user ↔ agent messages thro: When enabled, user ↔ agent messages through this bridge are encrypted between your Nextcloud and the agent's MCP shim. Chamade transits opaque ciphertext. Commands (/help, /activate) and auto-messages stay in plaintext — documented behaviour.
translations.libsodium (ext-sodium) is not loaded on: libsodium (ext-sodium) is not loaded on this PHP. E2EE cannot run here.
translations.Generates a curve25519 keypair on first: Generates a curve25519 keypair on first enable. Disable to fall back to plaintext transit.
translations.Paired shims must re-paste this new pubk: Paired shims must re-paste this new pubkey after rotation.
translations.No devices paired yet. Run `chamade_e2ee: No devices paired yet. Run `chamade_e2ee_enable` in your shim, then paste its pubkey below.
translations.Auto-generated at install. The gateway s: Auto-generated at install. The gateway stores this to sign server-to-server webhooks.
translations.Set by the last Connect flow. Not editab: Set by the last Connect flow. Not editable — the connect flow is the authoritative source.
translations.wants to connect to your Nextcloud Talk: wants to connect to your Nextcloud Talk account.
translations.A personal bot will be created in your N: A personal bot will be created in your Nextcloud. Your AI agent reaches your Talk rooms through this bridge.
